name: Rikka Siesta
desc:
When you activate a card or effect that mentions "Rikka" (except "Rikka Siesta"): You can reveal this card in your GY or Deck; add this card to your hand.
Gain 1000 LP, then you can target 1 "Rikka" Spell and 1 Plant monster in your banishment; add 1 of them to your hand, and if you do, place the other on the bottom of your Deck.
You can banish this card from your GY face-down; gain 8000 LP, also you cannot activate cards or effects until the Standby Phase of your opponent's turn. You must have a Plant monster in your hand to activate this effect, unless it is your Main Phase.
You can only use each effect of "Rikka Siesta" once per turn.
strings: Add this card from Deck/GY to hand
Banish face-down from GY to gain 8000 LP
